scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Barcode-1/frontend && npm install --prefix Barcode-1/backend && npm install --prefix "Legal mapping/frontend" && npm install --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal/frontend" && npm install --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal/backend" && npm install --prefix dashboard/frontend && npm install --prefix CoverLetterApp/backend && npm install --prefix DPD/frontend
scripts.dev:ai: npm run dev:frontend --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal/frontend"
scripts.dev:translator: cd "legal pro/AI Legal Portal/backend" && python ml_mapping_service.py
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:ai-proxy" "npm run dev:translator" "npm run dev:mapping" "npm run dev:barcode" "npm run dev:dpd:frontend" "npm run dev:dpd:backend" "npm run dev:coverletter"
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/dashboard dist/mapping dist/ai && npm run build --prefix dashboard && cp -r dashboard/dist/* dist/dashboard/ && npm run build --prefix "Legal mapping" && cp -r "Legal mapping"/dist/* dist/mapping/ && npm run build --prefix "legal pro/AI Legal Portal" && cp -r "legal pro/AI Legal Portal"/dist/* dist/ai/ && cp index.html dist/
